name: Highfold
description: AlphaFold modified for cyclic peptide structure prediction. Accurately predict the structures of native cyclic peptides from a single sequence, with 36 out of 49 cases predicted with high confidence (pLDDT > 0.85) matching the native structure with root mean squared deviation (RMSD) less than 1.5 Å.
capabilities: AlphaFold modified for cyclic peptide structure prediction

Accurately predict the structures of native cyclic peptides from a single sequence, with 36 out of 49 cases predicted with high confidence (pLDDT > 0.85) matching the native structure with root mean squared deviation (RMSD) less than 1.5 Å

sequence.description: Cyclic peptide amino acid sequence for structure prediction
